untranslatable_reason: Ascending Broadening Wedge requires multi-bar trend line detection (3+ touches with increasing divergence between upper/lower lines). This requires geometric regression/trend line fitting not available in the indicator library. The pattern's defining feature—broadening appearance with increasing distance between ascending trend lines—cannot be captured by standard indicators alone. Approximated with higher highs/lows, expanding ATR, and volume confirmation, but this does not accurately represent the true pattern geometry.
